◎译　　名　托托和他的姐姐们 / Toto and His Sisters
◎片　　名　Toto si surorile lui
◎年　　代　2015
◎产　　地　罗马尼亚 / 匈牙利 / 瑞士 / 加拿大
◎类　　别　纪录片
◎语　　言　罗马尼亚语
◎上映日期　2015-06-27(台北电影节)

◎片　　长　93分钟
◎导　　演　亚历山大·讷讷乌 Alexander Nanau
◎编　　剧　亚历山大·讷讷乌 Alexander Nanau
◎主　　演　安德烈·维奥莱塔·佩特 Andreea Violeta Petre


◎简　　介  

　　Toto and his two elder sisters come from a Roma family of junkies and drug dealers. Their troubled mother is again in prison, and little Toto is again waiting for her to come back. A tender, subtle observation of childhood, family relations and love. Non-sentimental and heartbreaking documentary.The camera is there when the fatherless Roma children visit their mother in prison...
